'''shakomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeamine|zeamine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-k-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeamine|zeamine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shakomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shækemeth|shækemeth]] || [[word:shækemej|shækemej]] || [[word:shækemesh|shækemesh]] || [[word:shækeme|shækeme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shakokomoth|shakokomoth]] || [[word:shakokomoj|shakokomoj]] || [[word:shakokomosh|shakokomosh]] || [[word:shakokomo|shakokomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shakomoth|shakomoth]] || [[word:shakomoj|shakomoj]] || [[word:shakomosh|shakomosh]] || [[word:shakomo|shakomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shakofmoth|shakofmoth]] || [[word:shakofmoj|shakofmoj]] || [[word:shakofmosh|shakofmosh]] || [[word:shakofmof|shakofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shakomotho|shakomotho]] || [[word:shakomojo|shakomojo]] || [[word:shakomosho|shakomosho]] || [[word:shakomoko|shakomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shakomoth|shakomoth]] || [[word:shakomoj|shakomoj]] || [[word:shakomosh|shakomosh]] || [[word:shakomo|shakomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shakomothol|shakomothol]] || [[word:shakomojol|shakomojol]] || [[word:shakomoshol|shakomoshol]] || [[word:shakomokol|shakomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shakomothotho|shakomothotho]] || [[word:shakomojojo|shakomojojo]] || [[word:shakomoshosho|shakomoshosho]] || [[word:shakomoko|shakomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shakomothon|shakomothon]] || [[word:shakomojon|shakomojon]] || [[word:shakomoshon|shakomoshon]] || [[word:shakomokon|shakomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shakomothoro|shakomothoro]] || [[word:shakomojoro|shakomojoro]] || [[word:shakomoshoro|shakomoshoro]] || [[word:shakomokoro|shakomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
